metadata.description: Senior iOS developer code review plugin for Claude Code. Dispatches a Fable 5 subagent that simulates BOTH the Apple App Review team and a senior Apple platform engineer — reviewing 12 dimensions across 4 tiers including App Store rejection risk, privacy, entitlements, security, HIG, accessibility, SwiftUI patterns, Swift 6 concurrency, and performance, with a real-simulator verification pass.

plugins.name: ios-senior-review
plugins.description: Comprehensive iOS / iPadOS / watchOS / tvOS / visionOS code review by a Fable 5 agent. Standard mode: single agent simulates BOTH the Apple App Review team AND a senior Apple platform engineer, with a simulator verification pass when available. Team mode (triggered by 'ios team review' or --team): the orchestrator acts as team lead, partitions the codebase into 4-10 non-overlapping scopes, dispatches senior-ios-reviewer sub-agents in one parallel wave, runs a runtime-verification pass and a seam review, and consolidates one unified report. Reviews 12 dimensions across 4 tiers, returns evidence-tagged findings with dual verdicts (submission readiness + engineering quality).
